name: open_meteo_historical_weather
description: Historical weather data for any Indian location from 1940 to present. Free, no key.
examples: पिछले साल दिल्ली में कितनी गर्मी पड़ी?
contextual_description: Historical weather archive for India from 1940 to present. Temperature, rainfall, wind data. Useful for climate analysis, monsoon patterns, historical comparisons.
